hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Wave damage is upgraded to Ultra-Wave damage.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *UItra-Wave: This skill's damage dealt increases by 40%. Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 35% of the damage dealt skill for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage to all enemies equal to #Factor_1# of ATK.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage to all enemies equal to #Factor_1# of ATK.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Wave: Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 20% of the damage dealt for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1171_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: When your turn starts, gain a Shield equal to 15% of Max HP for 1 turn. When other allies take single-target damage while you possess a Shield, you absorb 50% of that incoming damage and deal #Entry_1# damage equal to 150% ATK to the attacker. Each Retaliation grants all allies a stack of +15% non-active skill damage for 1 turn, stacking up to 3 times
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When your turn starts, gain a Shield equal to 15% of Max HP for 1 turn. When other allies take single-target damage while you possess a Shield, you absorb 50% of that incoming damage and deal #Entry_1# damage equal to 150% ATK to the attacker. Each Retaliation grants all allies a stack of +15% non-active skill damage for 1 turn, stacking up to 3 times
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Wave: Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 20% of the damage dealt for 1 turn
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Wave: Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 20% of the damage dealt for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1171_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: While you are on the field, all No Organization allies receive the following buffs: Basic stats increased by 24%. When HP exceeds 60%, ATK increases by 10% and extra damage dealt goes up by 18%. When HP drops below 60%, DEF-related stats increase by 15% and extra damage taken is reduced by 12%. Every 2 active skill casts raise your skill level
skills.max_desc_short_translated: While you are on the field, all No Organization allies receive the following buffs: Basic stats increased by 24%. When HP exceeds 60%, ATK increases by 10% and extra damage dealt goes up by 18%. When HP drops below 60%, DEF-related stats increase by 15% and extra damage taken is reduced by 12%. Every 2 active skill casts raise your skill level

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1171_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: Gain 1 Wave Strike stack each time an ally casts a non-active skill, up to 10 stacks. When your turn starts, if you hold any Wave Strike stacks, remove all stacks and grant corresponding buffs to No Organization allies based on the total cleared stacks: 1 stack: Damage taken from a single skill cannot exceed 40% of the unit's Max HP; 2 stacks: All stats increased by 6%; 3 stacks: The unit's ATK is multiplied by 1.2 for the duration of any damage-dealing skill they cast; 4 stacks: Single-target attacks deal extra damage equal to 80% of ATK, and that skill's total damage is boosted by 25%
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gain 1 Wave Strike stack each time an ally casts a non-active skill, up to 10 stacks. When your turn starts, if you hold any Wave Strike stacks, remove all stacks and grant corresponding buffs to No Organization allies based on the total cleared stacks: 1 stack: Damage taken from a single skill cannot exceed 40% of the unit's Max HP; 2 stacks: All stats increased by 6%; 3 stacks: The unit's ATK is multiplied by 1.2 for the duration of any damage-dealing skill they cast; 4 stacks: Single-target attacks deal extra damage equal to 80% of ATK, and that skill's total damage is boosted by 25%
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Wave Strike: All allies gain +4% DEF and Max HP, and their non-active skill damage increases by 5%
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Wave Strike: All allies gain +4% DEF and Max HP, and their non-active skill damage increases by 5%
